I like writing piano music sometimes, you can see some recordings on youtube [here](https://www.youtube.com/@joseph-w-oddy/playlists). The sheet music is also available on github [here](https://github.com/JosephOddy/piano_pieces).

# Recordings

## Four More Movements

```{=html}
<iframe width="100%" height="500" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/qEdp00cfZbs?list=PLsD5PIZKQXgP3GaVXeIQoTqaYVyzHdcSV" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen style="border-radius: 8px;"></iframe>
```

## Rose

```{=html}
<iframe width="100%" height="500" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/2mZLQ8sBwz0?list=PLsD5PIZKQXgMreky-QEvFbW4rXwm90Pf5" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen style="border-radius: 8px;"></iframe>
```


# Sheet music

## Four Movements

```{=html}
<object data="piano_music/Four Movements.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
    <p>It appears you don't have a PDF plugin for this browser.
    No biggie... you can <a href="piano_music/Four Movements.pdf">click here to
    download the PDF file.</a></p>
</object>
```

## Four More Movements

```{=html}
<object data="piano_music/Four More Movements.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="100%" style="min-height:100vh;">
    <p>It appears you don't have a PDF plugin for this browser.
    No biggie... you can <a href="piano_music/Four More Movements.pdf">click here to
    download the PDF file.</a></p>
</object>
```
